/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ultracode.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/ultracode.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ultracode.dir/src/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ultracode.dir/src/chunk_extractor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ultracode.dir/src/ollama_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ultracode.dir/src/repo_scanner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ultracode.dir/src/index_store.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ultracode.dir/src/retriever.cpp.o -o ultracode
